hero.subtitle: Guided by Neepa Patel — Life Coach, Wellness Expert, and NLP Trainer. We offer handcrafted candles, aromatherapy salts, and one-on-one coaching sessions to revitalize your mental strength and well-being.

about.title:
We believe in wellness and
the power to transform.
about.description: At Bodhisatvvam, we focus on revitalizing your mental strength, emotional well-being, and physical health. Whether through one-on-one life coaching or our handcrafted wellness products, our goal is to help you overcome fear, anxiety, and negativity.

pillars.name: Holistic Wellness
pillars.desc: Advanced coaching techniques to clear mental blockages and restore balance.

pillars.name: NLP Coaching
pillars.desc: Neuro Linguistic Programming to rewire your mindset for success.

pillars.name: Intention Candles
pillars.desc: Crafted with specific intentions to manifest your desires.

pillars.name: Aromatherapy Salts
pillars.desc: Specially formulated salts to protect, cleanse, and attract abundance.

consultation.title: Unsure Where to Start?
consultation.description: Every wellness journey is unique. Connect with Neepa for a Free Consultation to find the right path and products tailored specifically for your needs.

featured.description: Can't find exactly what you need? We create Custom Made Intention Candles specifically attuned to your personal goals and challenges.

items.text: After just one session with Neepa, I felt a positive shift that I hadn't experienced in years. The mindfulness coaching brought me clarity and peace I didn't know was possible.
items.name: Ananya S.

items.text: The Protection Salt has been incredible for my home. The atmosphere of our entire house shifted within days. My family noticed it too — calmer, more harmonious.
items.name: Rajesh M.

items.text: I was skeptical at first, but the NLP coaching session changed my perspective entirely. I've overcome anxiety that held me back for years. Truly grateful.
items.name: Priya K.

items.text: The custom-made candle Neepa created for my business intention started showing results within the first week. My client inquiries doubled!
items.name: Deepak T.

items.text: The prenatal wellness coaching was a beautiful experience. Neepa's gentle guidance during my pregnancy brought so much positivity. My baby is healthy and happy!
items.name: Sneha J.

items.text: I've been using the Money Attract Salt for 3 months now. The financial blocks I was facing have slowly but surely dissolved. Highly recommend Bodhisatvvam.
items.name: Vikram P.

footer.tagline: Empower Your Wellness & Transform Your Life. Guided by Neepa Patel, Life Coach & Wellness Expert.
